buttons.secondary: bg-[#faf8ff] text-[#003fb1] border border-[#c3c5d7] rounded-[4px] hover:bg-gray-50 transition-colors

inputs.style: border border-[#c3c5d7] rounded-[4px] bg-white focus:border-[#003fb1] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#003fb1] outline-none transition-all p-2 text-[16px]

status_chips.success: bg-[rgba(22,163,74,0.1)] text-[#16a34a] rounded-full px-3 py-1 text-[12px] font-[600] uppercase
status_chips.error: bg-[rgba(186,26,26,0.15)] text-[#ba1a1a] rounded-full px-3 py-1 text-[12px] font-[600] uppercase

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text over surface (#faf8ff) meets WCAG AA standards.

image_urls.description: Modern classroom interior with desks and chairs, showcasing clean design and ample natural light.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the color hex codes and Work Sans typography scale provided.
Implement pure HTML/Tailwind and customize Shadcn components to override their default radii (use 4px for inputs/buttons, 8px for cards).
Ensure 'data-testid' attributes on all interactive and key informational elements (e.g. data-testid="login-submit-button").
Build a responsive layout: bottom navigation bar for mobile (< 768px), and a permanent sidebar for desktop view.
Currency must always be formatted as INR (₹).
Implement daily and batch-wise attendance UI using the Status Chips for Present/Absent states.
